idea-plugin.name: Astagfirullah - Islamic Remembrance
idea-plugin.description:
Transform Your Waiting Time into Worship

Astagfirullah displays beautiful Islamic remembrance phrases (Dhikr) during Gradle builds, project sync, and other waiting periods in your IDE. Turn idle moments into opportunities for spiritual reflection with supplications, glorification, and blessings upon the Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).


Key Features

Multilingual Support

  • 7 Languages: Arabic (العربية), English, Urdu (أردو), Farsi (فارسى), Turkish (Türkçe), Indonesian (Bahasa), Bengali (বাংলা)
  • 31+ authentic Islamic supplications and phrases
  • Dynamic phrases synced from server with offline support

Smart Integration

  • Automatically displays during Gradle builds and project sync
  • Dedicated Tool Window for quick access (View → Tool Windows → Astagfirullah)
  • Settings page under Settings → Tools → Astagfirullah
  • Manual trigger to show phrases anytime

Customization

  • Configurable display duration (1-10 seconds per phrase)
  • Optional blessing sound "صلى على سيدنا محمد"
  • First-run setup wizard for easy configuration

Statistics & Tracking

  • Track total phrases displayed
  • Daily usage count
  • Session statistics
  • Favorite language tracking

Getting Started

  1. Install the plugin and restart your IDE
  2. Complete the setup wizard to choose your language
  3. Start a Gradle build or sync to see phrases
  4. Access settings via Tools → Astagfirullah

Open Source

This plugin is open source and welcomes contributions!

  • GitHub Repository - Source code and documentation
  • Report Issues - Bug reports and feature requests
  • Contribute - How to contribute code or translations
  • License - Apache 2.0

"Mention me in your good deeds"

Developer: Ali Al-Shahat Ali
Contact: LinkedIn | Email | GitHub
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2.0.0 - Major Release

Complete UI overhaul with professional settings and statistics

  • NEW: Professional Settings UI accessible from Settings → Tools → Astagfirullah
  • NEW: Tabbed interface with Settings, Statistics, and About sections
  • NEW: Beautiful Statistics dashboard with visual stat cards
  • NEW: Cache information panel showing sync status and version
  • NEW: "Days using plugin" tracker
  • NEW: Clear Cache button for troubleshooting
  • NEW: "Don't Ask Again" option in rating prompt
  • NEW: API integration for dynamic phrases from server
  • NEW: Offline caching with version-based sync
  • NEW: Daily auto-sync for Arabic and English phrases
  • IMPROVED: Rating prompt flow - shows only once per session
  • IMPROVED: Production-ready logging (debug logs hidden in release)
  • IMPROVED: Plugin description with better documentation
  • IMPROVED: Architecture with clean data layer separation
  • FIXED: JSON parsing error for API responses
  • FIXED: Rating notification showing repeatedly

Version 1.3.0

  • NEW: Dedicated Tool Window panel (View → Tool Windows → Astagfirullah)
  • NEW: Usage statistics tracking
  • NEW: Manual trigger button to show phrases anytime
  • NEW: Quick language switch from Tool Window

Version 1.2.0

  • NEW: 3 new languages: Turkish, Indonesian, Bengali
  • IMPROVED: Settings architecture with PersistentStateComponent
  • IMPROVED: Audio management with dedicated service
  • FIXED: Sound enable/disable logic

Version 1.1.4

  • Extended IDE compatibility to version 252
